description: Manage Google Photos app-created albums and media, upload files, and handle Picker sessions from terminal-friendly commands.

novel_features.name: Raw upload-token command
novel_features.description: Upload photo or video bytes to Google Photos' raw upload endpoint and return the upload token needed by media-items batch-create.

novel_features.name: Picker readiness waiter
novel_features.description: Poll Picker sessions until mediaItemsSet is true, using Google's returned polling interval and timeout guidance when present.

catalog_description: Manage Google Photos app-created albums and media, upload files, and handle Picker sessions from terminal-friendly commands.
